description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsMulti- coloured wallet with cool print on the front, one main zipped compartment with multiple slots, detachable handle to carry style and ease, stitch detailing and brand tab appliqued on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions: 10 cm x 15.5 cm
